headline: AJG Grows Canada Commercial Insurance Business With WMB Acquisition
summary: Arthur J. Gallagher expands its specialty insurance platform with the WMB acquisition, strengthening its commercial insurance presence in Western Canada.

headline: WTW Lags Industry, Trades at a Discount: What Investors Should Do Now?
summary: Willis Towers Watson's speciality pipeline, AI-driven margin expansion and the Newfront acquisition support long-term growth, though slower organic growth and macro risks remain.

headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Aon, Raises Price Target to $383
summary: UBS  analyst Brian Meredith   maintains Aon (NYSE:AON) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $360 to $383.

headline: Merck To Rally More Than 16%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Wednesday
summary: Wall St analysts changed outlook on top names. KBW cut AON PT to $400, Barclay's cut T PT to $24, MS cut ROL PT to $65, GS cut SAM PT to $169, BofA raised ALLY PT to $53, Citi raised EW PT to $110, Wells Fargo raised MRK PT to $150, Jefferies raised ENVA PT.

headline: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Maintains Outperform on Aon, Lowers Price Target to $400
